crime.value: Murder of Mackenzie - body disposal in river
crime.quote: She tugged until she had him midstream, then gave Mack a final pat. 'Goodbye, Mackenzie.'

victim.value: Mackenzie - killed in connection to Dominic and Nicholas
victim.quote: Unfortunately, it also meant traces that might tie back to Dominic and Nicholas.

culprit_and_motive.value: Raven killed Mackenzie, seeking revenge against Dominic and Nicholas
culprit_and_motive.quote: 'If it's the last thing I do, I'll get them.' Her words floated away

red_herring.value: Arnold threatens Beth and her father as deliberate misdirection from true perpetrator
red_herring.quote: Make no mistake, I intend to get to the bottom of it . . . and I'm not above using you to do it.

social_world.value: Family dysfunction and abandonment - mother's depression, father figure Julien leaving, parental neglect
social_world.quote: She just cries and tells Charleigh to go away. She has been like this ever since the fight with Julien

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence disposal in river - body wrapped in shower curtain, deliberate destruction of traces
reveal_mechanic.quote: She tugged until she had him midstream, then gave Mack a final pat. 'Goodbye, Mackenzie.'

investigator_wound.value: Beth's grief and trauma from mother's death affecting her perception and ability to cope
investigator_wound.quote: Grief did that. It messed with perceptions, distorting things, and caused life to tip on its side

_meta.title: ebook michelle kidd anybody 039 s child
